---
title: "Whole Game Practice"
subtitle: "Week 1"
author: Julianne Clina, PhD
date: 2026-06-24
image: "https://github.com/bhelsel/2026-RLAB-Practical-Exercises/raw/main/images/rlab-placeholder.png"
execute: 
  echo: true
  eval: true
  message: false
  warning: false
---

Week 1 practical assignment


```{r}
message("My first GitHub Push worked!")

x <- 1:10
mean(x)
```
